1.name: Favored Enemy
1.description: Choose a type of favored enemy (beast, humanoid, undead, etc.). Advantage on Survival checks to track and INT checks to recall info about them. Learn one language they speak.

1.name: Natural Explorer
1.description: Choose a favored terrain. Benefits include: INT/WIS skill checks doubled with proficiency, can't be slowed by difficult terrain, group can't become lost, alert to danger during travel, move stealthily at normal pace alone.

2.name: Fighting Style
2.description: Choose: Archery, Defense, Dueling, or Two-Weapon Fighting.

2.name: Spellcasting
2.description: Cast ranger spells using Wisdom. Know a set number based on level.

3.name: Ranger Archetype
3.description: Choose a subclass: Hunter, Beast Master, Gloom Stalker, Horizon Walker, Monster Slayer, Fey Wanderer, or Swarmkeeper.

3.name: Primeval Awareness
3.description: Expend a spell slot to sense aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain) for 1 minute per slot level.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

8.name: Land's Stride
8.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. Pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed or taking damage. Advantage on saves vs magical plants.

10.name: Hide in Plain Sight
10.description: Spend 1 minute camouflaging yourself. +10 to Stealth checks while motionless in natural terrain.

14.name: Vanish
14.description: Hide as a bonus action. Can't be tracked by nonmagical means.

18.name: Feral Senses
18.description: No disadvantage on attacks against invisible creatures. Aware of invisible creatures within 30 ft.

20.name: Foe Slayer
20.description: Once per turn, add WIS modifier to the attack roll or damage roll against a favored enemy.
